debug_info.goal:
a : Type
x : a
xs : List a
ih :
  (List.map reverse xs.reverse.tails).reverse =
    List.map (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a)
      (List.scanl (@flip a (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList.snocSL a))
        (Chapter3.SymList.nil a) xs)
⊢ List.map reverse (xs.reverse ++ [x]).tails =
    (List.map (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a)
          (List.scanl (@flip a (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList.snocSL a))
            (Chapter3.SymList.snocSL a x (Chapter3.SymList.nil a)) xs)).reverse ++
      [Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.nil a)]
